title: Why there needs to be a cross stabbed to yellow Eva 00
display_title: Why there needs to be a cross stabbed to yellow Eva 00
wikitext:
[]: Why there needs to be a cross stabbed to yellow Eva 00?             Quote Post by visionfactory » Thu Oct 14, 2010 6:50 pm Basically this SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by cd603 » Thu Oct 14, 2010 7:04 pm intersting photo...

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Thu Oct 14, 2010 7:31 pm A ha a Signal Termination Plug , it basically prevents the Eva unit from turning on when it is not in use. Never knew that came as one of the accessories for the EVA-00 action figure, and just out of curiosity which brand/version is it?

[]:             Quote Post by visionfactory » Thu Oct 14, 2010 8:27 pm It's Eva 00 Soul SPEC. I'm glad the cross has a meaning and it's not just randomly put there because it looks nice. Thanks!

[]:             Quote Post by Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion » Thu Oct 14, 2010 8:59 pm If it stops the units from being used why bother putting handcuffs on it?

[]:             Quote Post by Shinies » Thu Oct 14, 2010 9:12 pm Maybe because as humans we don't trust even the most "secure" of things. And really, when you have 80 meters organic beings with godlike powers you can't be cautious enough.

[]:             Quote Post by Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion » Thu Oct 14, 2010 9:13 pm Aren't Evangelions around 45-50 meters? Edit: 42 should be right. http://www.evamonkey.com/randomimages/evaheightcomparison.jpg

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Thu Oct 14, 2010 9:17 pm Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion wrote: If it stops the units from being used why bother putting handcuffs on it?

[]:             Quote Post by Shinies » Thu Oct 14, 2010 9:25 pm Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion wrote: Aren't Evangelions around 45-50 meters? Edit: 42 should be right. http://www.evamonkey.com/randomimages/evaheightcomparison.jpg

[]:             Quote Post by Seph » Thu Oct 14, 2010 9:32 pm Shinies wrote: Well in the artwork book as far as I can recall they say that the actual height is 80 meters. Let me find those images and post them if I find them.

[]:             Quote Post by Shinies » Thu Oct 14, 2010 10:41 pm I've heard that before and it seems it holds ground. Still I like to think they really are 80 meter beasts. But anyway they are never below the 40 range.

[]:             Quote Post by Hoshikawa-kun » Thu Oct 14, 2010 11:05 pm Signal Termination plugs are basically big nonconductive rods shoved in to keep synapses from making connections. I'd wager that the handcuffs are there in case an Eva manages to somehow get a signal through and starts berserking. Really, Ritsuko has to deal with so much BS from the Evas and Angels on a day to day basis, I'm betting she handcuffs empty test tubes just in case they start to set off Third Impact.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Thu Oct 14, 2010 11:32 pm visionfactory wrote: It's Eva 00 Soul SPEC. I'm glad the cross has a meaning and it's not just randomly put there because it looks nice. Thanks!

[]:             Quote Post by jojojoker » Fri Oct 15, 2010 3:21 am I wonder why it didn't just get its core removed like Unit-02 in 2.22. Core removal would definitely mean zero chance of reactivation until it is installed again.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Fri Oct 15, 2010 5:40 am Seph wrote: The Eva's constantly vary in height depending on what the artists thought looked best in the scene.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Fri Oct 15, 2010 2:13 pm Really, Ritsuko has to deal with so much BS from the Evas and Angels on a day to day basis, I'm betting she handcuffs empty test tubes just in case they start to set off Third Impact.

[]:             Quote Post by Seph » Fri Oct 15, 2010 5:49 pm TMBounty_Hunter wrote: Due to the magic of CGI and more consistency in Rebuild the Evas are officially pegged as 80m. Both the 1.0 and the 2.0 Complete Record Collection books illustrate this quite clearly. On a 10m grid from 1.0 CRC: http://imgur.com/SkBd8.jpg On a 4m grid from 2.0 CRC: http://imgur.com/3Ovjr.jpg 40m is SRW game height only and in the past SRW made the Evas 15m at one point

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Oct 15, 2010 10:12 pm visionfactory wrote: Why there needs to be a cross stabbed to yellow Eva 00?

[]:             Quote Post by Assasinate » Mon Oct 18, 2010 3:45 am jojojoker wrote: I wonder why it didn't just get its core removed like Unit-02 in 2.22. Core removal would definitely mean zero chance of reactivation until it is installed again.
